mermaidSyntax:
graph TD
  A[Literature Review] --> B[Hypothesis Formation]
  B --> C[Study Design]
  C --> D[Data Collection]
  C --> E[Ethical Approval]
  D --> F[Data Analysis]
  E --> F
  F --> G[Results Interpretation]
  G --> H[Publication]
  style A fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#3b82f6
  style B fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#3b82f6
  style C fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#f59e0b
  style D fill:#d1fae5,stroke:#10b981
  style E fill:#fce7f3,stroke:#ec4899
  style F fill:#e0e7ff,stroke:#6366f1
  style G fill:#e0e7ff,stroke:#6366f1
  style H fill:#dcfce7,stroke:#22c55e
